name: Rion Aida
description: Rion Aida (相田りおん Aida Rion) is the 18-year-old daughter of Gozo Aida and the salvaging partner of Aika Sumeragi. Although she often appears to get on Aika's nerves, Aika clearly cares for her, as shown when she risked her life to save Rion from the Delmo Corps.
creator: Her0age@t
